highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.119.4 stabilises Tizen, tvOS and GTK4, refreshes native dependencies, and lands the redesigned Gallery.
highlights_body: This servicing release adds Linux Bionic and Tizen x64/arm64 native assets, fixes long-standing tvOS and GTK4 crashes, hardens AoT and stream handling, and refreshes libpng, libwebp, brotli and libexpat. The developer sample suite is rebuilt end-to-end and the docs move to an interactive Blazor Gallery.

bullets.detail: Adds SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4 built on GirCore.Gtk-4.0 so GTK4 apps get a first-class SkiaSharp surface.
SKManagedStream now snapshots into SKData instead of maintaining a parent/child chain, removing a class of ownership crashes when streams outlive their owner.
SkiaSharp no longer crashes at startup when the app is published with IlcDisableReflection=true.
SKDrawingArea no longer hits a Cairo assertion when the widget is realised.

bullets.lead: tvOS builds stop mixing simulator and device frameworks
bullets.detail: The tvOS NativeReference targets now split device and simulator frameworks the same way iOS does, so builds pick the right binary.
SKGLView now redraws after switching tabs in a MAUI TabBar on Android.
The WindowsForms controls read DesignMode directly instead of walking the component tree, which fixes designer-only misbehaviour.
D3D12 DLLs are now delay-loaded so Windows machines without DirectX 12 no longer crash on startup.
Adds a Linux Bionic (Android libc) native asset alongside the existing glibc build.
Adds Tizen x64 and arm64 native builds and moves Tizen to Studio 6.1 with corrected TFMs.
Moves the build to the .NET 10 SDK with workload-set pinning, and adds a net48 target used for Windows validation.
Linux and Android native builds now enforce -Wl,--no-undefined so missing symbols fail the build instead of the runtime.
libpng, libwebp, brotli and libexpat are all updated in the bundled Skia to pick up the current upstream fixes.

contributor_summaries.4Darmygeometry: Linux Bionic native assets, a net48 validation target, and PolySharp for C# 13 on legacy TFMs.
contributor_summaries.sshumakov: Spectre-mitigation build flags for the Windows and Linux native binaries.
contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Moved the AI agent configuration to a shared location for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot.
contributor_summaries.SimonvBez: Fixed SKGLView not redrawing after switching tabs in a MAUI Android TabBar.

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 opened the 3.119.4 servicing line, gathering the tvOS, GTK4 and AoT fixes and refreshing the samples and docs.

harfbuzz_summary: Picks up the tvOS device/simulator split, the Tizen native additions and the .NET 10 SDK move that also apply to the HarfBuzzSharp binding.
